subject: (no subject)
body:
There is an IT guy who dave worked w/at law firm whom I previously approved for him to help him set up 65 server and w/some bb issues - he is technically apparently better than dave - I like him and I have worked w/him before + he knows us and our system. I have interviewed 3 people I don't like already. This friend of Dave's is interested - I will interview him Monday afternoon 4.45 and I'll have Darren interview - he would be a great fit and a v easy transfer. I'm happy about this..




Thx

G
